game.short_text: Survive a godlike machine as a small rat.
game.title: Varmint

details.title: Varmint
details.description:
(Formerly known as "The Rat & The Machine")
Separated from its family and mercilessly hunted by an unstoppable machine, a tiny rat embarks on a doomed quest for salvation. Traverse the wreckage of a ruined world, outwit and outmaneuver a godlike machine, and find your family, if they're even alive.
**NOTE: This game is in active development. The current download is for the old game jam version of Varmint (Rat & The Machine), made for the GMTK Game Jam 2024. The final product will be an overall smoother and higher quality experience.
The Jam Version Features:
-10-20 minute playthrough
-Fluid 2D movement
-Immersive and atmospheric visual style
Enjoyed the game? A full version is coming soon! Check out the devlogs or the discord for updates: https://discord.gg/rRwg35z8mX

game.short_text: Cold pizza for $32.00? Sign me up!
game.title: Pizzascaper

details.title: Pizzascaper
details.description:
Your job is kinda boring, but it pays the bills... sometimes.
Made in 4 days for GMTK2024. 

Credits:
Arcy - Lead programmer, Sound design, UI & Game design         
Yollie - Programmer, Main artist & Game design         
Jett Mance - Music 

Prox - Voice Acting

Controls:
    
WASD - Move

Left Mouse - Shoot ProjectileRight Mouse - Scale ProjectileHold R - Quick RestartEsc - Pause

Made in Unity
    
 Made using FMOD Studio by Firelight Technologies Pty Ltd. 
    
Linux and Mac versions are untested and may require giving execution perms! Example on Mac: chmod -R 755 /Path/to/BuildMac.app
Known bugs:
- After going back to menu and then back to a level low pass filter applies to the music, and after pausing and unpausing in that state the game freezes until you go back to menu again. Relaunch game to fix.
Update 1.1
 Wallrunning has been re-tuned
Should be way easier to start and keep
 Now also way "straighter" and tries to self correct vertical velocity
 Jumping off a wallrun now grants slightly more speed
 Added true momentum retention to wall run: The speed you have when you enter the wall run will now be re-applied when you jump out of a wall run, decaying as you wall runInert pillars can now be stacked infinitely (So you can build a house)
Both shoot cooldown and and expansion cooldown have been halved
Aircube QOL fix, expanding a cube when its really close to a surface will now make a regular purple cube instead of expanding into an aircube clipping into the wall
Antigrav glitch nerfed, now it reduces gravity instead of completely removing it
This was because I didn’t want it to be used to completely cheese Long Long Man
(it should also now be slightly more consistent)
Aircube now has a hard cap of 4 when the player is airborne. This resets when you land
Slightly increased inertia

resultData.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Panda and had to Collect Coins by Rolling Away on Built-to-Scale Platforms

game.short_text: 🎍 Build platforms, scale them, collect 🪙 coins, and roll your 🐼 panda up the leaderboard! 🏅
game.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Panda and had to Collect Coins by Rolling Away on Built-to-Scale Platforms

details.title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Panda and had to Collect Coins by Rolling Away on Built-to-Scale Platforms
details.description:
「That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Panda and had to Collect Coins by Rolling Away on Built-to-Scale Platforms」
Build platforms, scale them, collect coins, and roll your Panda up the leaderboard!
Play time
Around 5min to discover (read controls first), around 15 to get good!
Controls
You can't control your Panda, it rolls forward and falls on its own

Mouse click drag-and-drop : Build a platform
Mouse wheel scroll : Scale a built platform

Optional controls :

Backspace : quick restart

Mechanics

Pick up coins to gain score
The faster you're going, the more points each coin will award
Red coins speed you up (you'll earn more), blue coins slow you down (you'll earn less)

Rules

Maximum 2 platforms at the same time!
If you scale down a platform too thin, it disappears
If your Panda gets squished between platforms, you lose
If your Panda gets off the screen, you lose

About the game
Solo-made in 43h, spanning 4 days, by 📦@Colisan
Tools used: Clickteam Fusion 2.5+, Aseprite, BFXR
Music and wood ambiant sound from GameDevMarket, all other assets are made from-scratch during the jam
The entire devlog is viewable 🎬here on Twitch.tv (in french)
I know download-only games can be a bit scary, but this engine's web export is broken. You'll find a clean virus analysis here if that can help
Post-jam minor fixes

Removed "space to pause" that really made it seems like the game crashed
Added a mandatory drop after the spawn, to encourage building in the gapRemoved the "made for LD52" .exe description, left from wiping the previous game and starting anew in the same file for waaaay too many jams

🔗Download jam deadline version here
🔗Download CTF .mfa sources here
TL;DR: Quick start please!
Click to build, scroll to scale, speed=pointsFirst move: Platform beneath panda + scale it up

game.short_text: 2D Puzzle Platformer Game
game.title: The Strongest Strongman

details.title: The Strongest Strongman
details.description:
The Strongest Strongman
GMTK Game Jam 2024 Candidate - 5th place in the overall player rankings!

Get ready to complete 12 unique levels in this new 2D puzzle platformer game! Step into the shoes of Mighty Otto, a typical 19th-century strongman, and experience his incredible circus act. 
Use Otto's awesome strength to deform and change the size of iron blocks to solve mind-blowing puzzles that will allow him to reach his dumbbell and complete the level. 
For Otto, everything is built to scale!



CONTROLS:
• Press A/D to move the character
• Press SPACE to jump
• Press J while ON GROUND to Shoulder Bash
• Press J while FALLING to Butt-Stomp
• Press R to reset the level

TEAM:
• Francesco Brancato (Game Designer) 
• Giorgio Michele De Giorgio (Game Programmer) 
• Francesco Luzzi (Game Designer, Pixel Artist) 
• Arakiwi (Game Designer, 2D Artist)

game.short_text: re:scale is a retro styled puzzle platformer with a unique scaling twist.
game.title: re_scale

details.title: re_scale
details.description:
re:scale is a retro styled puzzle platformer with a unique scaling twist. You control MD, a little piece of malware, who is definitely up to no good.
To get to the end of a level, you have to use the mechanic of scaling the in-game window, which scales the world itself around MD. Help MD finish his goal of infecting the host’s entire PC with this malicious virus!Controls:
A/D to moveW/SPACE to jumpS to crouch (activate levers)Right mouse button drag to rescale the window resolutionYou can also drag the corners of the window to rescale
Technical details:
We recommend downloading the .exe instead of playing online, as particles don't work on the webPlaying in fullscreen is optimal, you can toggle fullscreen in settingsYou can close the window and open it again to reset the current levelThe start menu can be used to quit the gameThe trash bin on the desktop resets all progress!
Credits:
Ondar111 - lead programming
  
Niksld - programmingMichaelCZ - composer, audio design, level designGrimReapTM - graphics, additional programmingVajaVajush - graphics, emotional support
Cat pictures sourced from VajaVajush, Jimmi420 and Know Your Meme. Select sound effect sourced from Pixabay. All other graphics, sound effects and music are custom made by us.OST:https://embed.music.apple.com/us/album/re-scale-ost-single/1766076272https://open.spotify.com/embed/album/4nVrAIzrskh2KfuURQuNu2?utm_source=generator

Welcome to The Boiler Room!
This game was built in 3 days for the 2024 GMTK game jam with the theme, "built to scale"
Use your mouse to order your soot sprites around. They can fill the furnace with coal to heat water and harvest scented herbs. A couple dozen of those and you could run a successful bathhouse. 
Careful stoking that fire, though. If the tank is full and you keep adding coal, it could explode!
Buy houses and upgrade them to increase your soot sprite population
  
happy soot sprites are productive soot sprites :3
Don't forget to upgrade that boiler, too. She's old. Been breaking down sometimes. Click on the boiler to upgrade or repair it.

game.short_text: You are a robot built to angle fish and scale them for hungry "customers".
game.title: Scale the Depths

details.title: Scale the Depths
details.description:
2025/10/09 Update - And if you’d like to hang out, chat, drop a meme, or share your favourite weird deep-sea creatures, join our Discord!https://discord.gg/UA2fvpdPar❗2025/06/19 Update - We’ve released the demo for the full version of Scale the Depths! You can try it out now on our game’s Steam page!

09/05 Update - We are excited that you can now Wishlist the full game on Steam. We're actively planning improvements and new features that we can’t wait for you to experience. Stay tuned for more updates and thank you for your continued support!08/27 Update - Thanks to everyone for the amazing feedback, we're so glad you all enjoyed the game! We loved working on this game so much that we are planning a new and improved version soon. Check out our website or follow Glass Gecko Games on Itch.io for updates and more!
09/04 Update - We made it to the Top 20 GMTK video, and we couldn’t have done it without all your incredible support, feedback, and enjoyment of our little fish game! We're more motivated than ever to turn this into a full game, packed with more features, fish, friends to feed, and plenty of fun for you to enjoy! Be sure to follow Glass Gecko Games on our socials and itch.io for updates. Thank you all for making this jam an amazing experience—we couldn’t have done it without you!
~=----------------------------------------=~
This game was made for the 2024 GMTK Game Jam. You are a robot built to feed hungry aquatic "customers"! Scale the depths with your trusty fishing rod, then scale the depths again, but in the sense of scaling fish. It's best played in full-screen.~=-------------CONTROLS------------=~
A / D Keys: Move left and right (player and fishing hook)
E Key: Interact
Mouse: Everything else
~=-----------HOW TO PLAY----------=~
1. Start at the far left and interact to start fishing. The fishing line will automatically descend; use A and D to control its direction. Ram a fish with the hook to deal damage to it, fishing it up after dealing enough. 
2. Take your newly caught fish to the Scaling station, where you can scale your newly caught fish. Once you're done scaling a fish, press the button at the top right corner to finish!
3. Feed your cleaned fish to the hungry customer on the right, who will pay you after they're fully satiated.
4. Access the shop using the button in the top right corner to purchase upgrades for your knife, fishing line, and hook!
5. Repeat, until you finally SCALE THE DEPTHS!
~=-------------CREDITS------------=~

 
Chace Nielson (Kar2fast) - ProgrammingEmmanuel Omari-Osei (E-man248) - Programming4n6u - ProgrammingOluwatoni Osho - Programming, Sound, Music
Serpexnessie - ArtPepocandii - ArtGaul_Blatter - MusicMadog - QASharkyFerret - Special Thanks
 
~=-------------NOTES------------=~ 
This game was made as part of the GMTK Game Jam 2024,  with the "Built to Scale" theme. In this game, you are a robot BUILT TO SCALE Fish and the Depths!
Made by Glass Gecko Games  (Itch page)During the jam, the executable download was broken, but the WebGL version was perfectly functional. Post-jam, a new .zip containing the working game executable was uploaded--There are no differences between this new version and the original WebGL version of the game.

game.short_text: What if your window manager was a puzzle game?
game.title: Windowframe

details.title: Windowframe
details.description:
Description
What if your window manager was a puzzle game?
Windowframe is a little experimental puzzle game making use of the widely known capabilities of windows. In order to get to the goal for each level, you will have to move, scale, and stretch the windows in various ways, with some twists here and there.
Hope you enjoy! ^-^
Made for GMTK 2024, for the theme Built To Scale.
Very much inspired by Windowkill by torcado.
Controls
WASD / Arrow Keys to moveMouse to move, scale, and stretch the windowsR to restart
Third-Party Assets
Silkscreen FontDownload the version appropriate for your OS and run the executable, although we highly recommend you play it on Windows, as the Mac version does not work currently, and there have been reports of lag on the Linux version.
Warning: As this game is quite experimental, and uses the OS windows as a game mechanic, the game may be quite buggy, and depending on your screen resolution, certain game elements might go off screen if your screen resolution is too small, as the game was designed to be played on a 1920 x 1080 screen.
If you are unable to play due to these issues, we apologize in advance, and we appreciate you for giving our game a chance.

game.short_text: Puzzle Game with Nesting Dolls
game.title: Nested

details.title: Nested
details.description:
Hi! Nested is a grid based puzzle game made as part of the Game Makers Tool Kit 2024 Jam. The theme was: Built to Scale.
The idea was to play as nesting dolls of differents sizes and colors. You can then move  and fit them into each other. You also have buttons in the environment that allows you to change your scale and colors based on the order you have stacked your dolls.
Hope you like it! (sorry in advance,  the puzzles might be difficult...)

Controls:
- Moving: 'WASD', Arrow keys or Joystick
- Eject: press 'E' on keyboard or 'X' on controller
- Go back One Move: press 'Q' on keyboard or 'B' on controller
- Press 'Start' on controllers or 'P' on keyboard if you want to restart level or quit game

Music Credits:
"Ethereal Relaxation" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 Licensehttp://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

game.short_text: 🖱️⌨ A Kaiju fighting game where you control your giant Mecha with a grappling hook
game.title: Concrete Kaiju

details.title: Concrete Kaiju
details.description:
コンクリト怪獣 CONCRETE KAIJU プレゼンテーショ
CONCRETE KAIJU is a platformer/fighting game where you control a giant mecha by pulling on its member with your measuring tape. Scale your mecha, and pull on its hands or feet to hit and defeat the kaiju that is attacking the city. 
To get around, you can grapple the mecha's bolts with your tape and swing and double jump. Don't get scared to fly off in the beggining, getting the hand of it is part of the fun once you master swinging around your concrete mecha.

On the big scale, you have to beat your lizard foe by punching its face or its core while simultaneously blocking its attacks. First one to land 3 punches or kicks win the fight.

But in order to do so, you'll need to control your mecha by pulling its limbs around with the help of your mesuring tape as a makeshift grappling hook. Try to always keep both the small and the big picture in mind - and in sight - by switching between scenes with the mouse's scroll.
Good Luck !
コントロール CONTROLS リマインダー

game.short_text: Help the crooked old townsfolk of Sorrow's Creek with their belongings.
game.title: Pothos Fate

details.title: Pothos Fate
details.description:
This game was made during the GMTK GameJam 2024

Story:
After many years of exciting adventures and dangerous endeavours, the small town of Sorrow's Creek had fallen silent. 
The townsfolk were no longer interested in fighting monsters or travelling to other lands. 
And so it was that Pothos the Green was no longer wanted for his magical wizardry in battle, but rather for changing the size of their everyday objects.
And such was the fate of Pothos the Green. Forever using his immense power to help the crooked old townsfolk of Sorrow's Creek with their belongings.

How to Play:
The goal is to resize the given object so that it fits the objective found underneath the current customer. On the left side are a few options to help you with that. The hint always shows a different scaling value from the one you are supposed to figure out. 
Size calculation:All sizes are calculate in terms of the smallest cuboid that could fit around the object. Not the actual volume or surface area of the mesh.
Levels:There are 3 levels in total. If you reach the criteria of a given level you automatically enter the next one. If you don't, the curtain closes and you start anew.

Retrospective:
My main goal was to make a game that felt polished in aspects of game art, theme, and interaction. I'm very happy with the vibe I was able to achiev. The sound, the art, the story are all aspects I absolutely adore.
The gameplay however fell very short. I think the calculations are wrong at times, the score is not well calculated, and the overall feel of the gameplay just isn't good. It feels very random. 
I have learned alot of new things in this GameJam and I'm eager to keep on improving my skillset. While I would've loved to polish the gameplay more I'm very happy with my result.

details.description:
We're continuing development! Go play the new demo on Steam & Wishlist to be alerted when the full game comes out. This page will remain up as a piece of history to preserve the original GMTK 2024 jam game.
Build & Climb!
Help the famous adventuring duo Cappy and Tappy escape the crumbling Temple of Peril! Cappy will leap, bound, and climb to escape the temple, while Tappy drops in blocks to aid in his escape. 
Play with a friend or solo! Both are recommended!

Collect the Idols for an extra challenge! They belong in a museum!
Controls
Cappy 
Mouse and Keyboard
WASD to moveSPACE to jumpPress and hold SPACE while in the air to grab a climbing holdWhile hanging, hold a direction and release to launch from the hold
Controller
LEFT STICK to moveA to jumpPress and hold A while in the air to grab a climbing holdWhile hanging, hold a direction and release to launch from the hold
Tappy
Mouse and Keyboard
MOUSE to move the hookLEFT CLICK to pick up blocks from the queue on the leftRIGHT CLICK to rotate blocksLEFT CLICK again to drop blocks
Controller
LEFT STICK to move the hookA  to pick up blocks from the queue on the leftB  to rotate blocksA  again to drop blocks
Hazards and Helpers
Campfire: Respawn point, run over to light
Idol: Collectables for an extra challenge. Not needed to complete the level
Spikes: If hit you'll respawn at the highest campfire (watch out!)
Holds: Grab onto and launch from for faster and funner traversal
Breaker: Will break blocks they come into contact with, but too big to harm Cappy

Arrows: Like spikes but they can fly (keep it moving!)

Credits

Declan Morrison - Programming, sounds, & artGeorge Philbrick - ProgrammingJames Saunders - Music & Sounds Micah Kelly - Lead ArtistOliver Philbrick - Programming

game.short_text: A sweet little game about toys playing you a song!
game.title: Playing By Ear

details.title: Playing By Ear
details.description:
♬ Playing By Ear ♬
Playing By Ear is an interactive musical management game. Keep your choir in the correct musical scale and maintain unity in sound.
Controls
Left Mouse Button:Parry a toy's mistakeMouse Drag: Adjust knobs (horizontal)ESC:pause


Known Bugs
Several bugs from the jam version have been fixed! We will update this list with current bugs.
Story
The toys from your childhood got brought to life somehow, and they decided to form a band. the problem is: they are kinda bad.  Sometimes they play out of tune or sometimes the guitarist Roo puts on too much distortion.
Manage their lack of talent! Correct their mistakes by turning the knobs on the respective pedal, or give them a burst of focus by tapping on their hologram-ball.
NOTE:
The game was made for the Game Maker's Toolkit 2024 Jam, it may have bugs (computer ones!) and that's OK. For any game-breaking issues, feel free to comment below.
How To Play
Your goal is to make sure all the band members are playing in the correct musical scale. You accomplish this through two knobs on each character. By waving the mouse towards the bottom of the screen, you can see a pedal with two knobs. Each knob has two lights, when a light is on, the knob is adjusted correctly. When the light is off, the knob is incorrect. Adjust the knob to correctly get the band member back into the correct musical scale.
Or you can parry their mistakes! Avoid having to adjust them entirely by successfully tapping them when they begin shaking! make sure to do it when sparks come out!
The levels increase in difficulty from top to bottom.

Credits
Anasten27 - Character Concepts, Character Rigging and AnimationCédric - Music, SFXLou - Character art, Various Graphics and Itch.io PageJoshua - 3D background, 3D rendering and UIVan - Programming, Team LeadFurkan Kambay - ProgrammingTololon - Programming
Attributions
- Audio Engine: FMOD Studio by Firelight Technologies Pty Ltd.
- https://www.1001freefonts.com/digital-play-st.font
- https://www.fontspace.com/musical-tone-font-f103067

game.short_text: Solve puzzles in an old music box by creating your own music scales!
game.title: Swan Song (Demo)

details.title: Swan Song (Demo)
details.description:
Swan Song is a cozy and emotional puzzle game. Use notes of different shapes and sizes to program a music box and solve each puzzle. Help the swan reach the exit as you uncover a touching story of family, loss and grief.                                  
Wishlist now on steam!
https://store.steampowered.com/widget/3265290/
A Short Description
Swan Song is a relaxing puzzle game about music, family & loss. Solve puzzles inside a music box, all the while uncovering the tragic story behind the box, it's maker and his family.
How does it work?
Each puzzle is a piece of music waiting to be written. Place musical notes on your scale. Their position determines which platforms activate when the melody plays. Once you’ve composed your solution, turn the key and let the music guide the swan through the level.

Perfect timing and thoughtful placement are the keys to success. Between puzzles, a touching narrative slowly unfolds, revealing the story of the music box’s creator and the family it was made for.
The Story
You discover an old, mysterious music box filled with personal artifacts. This was the creator’s final masterpiece, his “swan song”. Lovingly crafted as a tribute to his family.

With every puzzle you solve, fragments of his story come to light. What happened to the family? What secrets does the box hold? Let the music lead you through a story of grief, memories & regret.

Join our discord for more regular updates:
https://discord.com/invite/hyEhfENBQN

game.short_text: Explore the deep sea and the giants beneath the waves
game.title: Out of Depth

details.title: Out of Depth
details.description:
This game was made in its entirety in 96 hours for the GMTK 2024 Game Jam to the theme "Built to Scale". All art, music, voice lines, and code were made during the jam and are entirely original.
CONTROLS
An arrow pointing to the ship is in the Sonar.
WASD - Movement
Mouse - Aiming
Left Click or Q - ScanRight Click or E - Stun GrenadeESC - Pause
Dive down and scan sea creatures for credits when you return to the ship. Spend those credits on upgrades to get deeper and scan bigger and more aggressive fish. Don't run out of oxygen and don't get hit too much or else you won't make it back in one piece.
FEATURES
Beautiful hand drawn graphicsReplayable exploration-focused gameplay19 discoverable marine creaturesCharming characters to guide you
A dynamic soundtrack that changes depending on the situation
Over 15 minutes of original music
Voice acting
200+ art assets drawn (all during the duration of the jam)
If you're experiencing lag consider downloading the game!

Join Captain Solomon Sewell, PhD; and his granddaughter Katherine, Resident Mechanic, in exploring the deep! Explore a vast and deep open ocean, record critters, and evade colossal terrors of deep-sea gigantism the further you go.

The deep ocean is a unique environment that allows for marine life to grow to sizes far greater than one might see closer to the surface. You've joined an expedition team researching this phenomenon of deep sea gigantism. Dive down in your scrappy submarine and discover the beauty and horror of the sea, earn respect and compensation for your research, fix up your submarine, and do it all again. What secrets lie at the ocean floor? Only a dive through the depths will reveal them to you, brave explorer.


CREDITS
Daniel Graves - Game Director, Programming, Creature Behavior, UI Animation
Jason Li - Team Coordination, Game Design, Quality Assurance, Voice of Solomon
Jonathan Xu - Programming
Emiliano Aguayo - Art Direction, Environments, and Sprites
Coco Wang - UI/UX art and design, Promotional Art, Character Design, and Animation
Benjamin Wang - Music and SFX
Desolo Zantas - Additional Music
Eros Wyers - Voice of Katherine
Additional Credits:
Special thanks to the folks that helped playtest and provided additional support and feedback over the course of the Jam:
@dandelionofluff
@trufous
@hummuuss@birb5584


Known Bugs, Errors, and Missing Features:
Lion's Mane and Nautilus description is missing in the Catalogue and Expedition Summary screenDue to time constraints some creatures are not included (these are indicated with a cross in the Catalogue)Scanner will continue to scan despite game being pausedOxygen may continue to decrease after docking (if you're very low, just exit immediately)IMPORTANT: Bobbit Worm (giant boss) can be scanned but will break all other scans during the current dive

resultData.title: (GMTK Jam) This sentence is a maze

game.short_text: There is all the beauty, richness, and complexity of the world in a single sentence.
game.title: (GMTK Jam) This sentence is a maze

details.title: (GMTK Jam) This sentence is a maze
details.description:
This Sentence is a Maze is a collaborative online game that transforms a simple sentences into a vast and intricate labyrinth of narratives. Dive into this unique social experiment where every word you click can lead you down a new path, filled with stories crafted by players from around the world.

In This Sentence is a Maze, every sentence is a starting point for a new adventure. Each word within the sentence is clickable, offering two possibilities:

These words have already been claimed by other players. Clicking on them allows you to explore the story they've created from that point.

These words are unclaimed and open for you to take. When you claim a green word, you get to write the continuation of the sentence, creating your own story branch within the labyrinth.
Once you've claimed a word and written your continuation, other players can claim words within your story and expand the narrative even further. As more players contribute, the labyrinth grows, becoming increasingly complex and filled with creative twists and turns.


Endless Creativity: Your imagination is the only limit as you explore and create within the narrative maze.Collaborative Storytelling: Work together with players from around the world to build an ever-expanding world of stories.Search Functionality: Jump directly into the heart of the maze by searching for specific words, allowing you to explore stories that interest you the most.



Be Creative: Don’t hesitate to take the story in unexpected directions.Explore Before You Claim: Read existing stories to get inspired or to find interesting words to claim.Collaborate: This is a community-driven game, so build on others' ideas to enrich the labyrinth.
You like our work on this game jam and you want to play to our current game in development ? Here it is !Thanks for playing !

game.short_text: A cosy and mildly unnerving puzzle platformer
game.title: Shrinky dinky

details.title: Shrinky dinky
details.description:
Shrinky dinky
Brought to you by FEEDHOLE ADVANCE 1998
Made for GMTK Game Jam 2024: Built to Scale 
** play fullscreen **In this cosy and mildly unnerving puzzle platformer, you are a little scribble demon traversing a strange and curious world.

Shrink or grow the boxes to create a path to the portal on each level. Any sides touching will allow movement between.
You can resize any box corner with indicators, but scaling a box while standing inside it will also scale the player- use this to your advantage!PS  be wary the eels.
Controls

Move:    A+D / arrows
Jump:    spacebar
Pause menu:    P
Restart level:    R

Created by

Pontus:    Code
William:    Code
Elke:    Art & animation
SFX from freesounds.org

Thank you for playing :)

game.short_text: play with shadows using imagination of a child!
game.title: My Shadows Are Bright

details.title: My Shadows Are Bright
details.description:
Feel like a child again! Use your imagination and combine shadows on the wall into stories to dream about!
This game lets you place objects, cast their shadows on the wall, and then become a shadow yourself and play the level you created! All with a pure joy only a child may experience.
A winning entry for GMTK Game Jam 2024. Theme: "Built to scale".
How it was made ▶️
Design: buday and GGroysCode: budayArt: GGroys(discord to get notifiied of new games, videos and streams)

game.short_text: Stack to the stars in this collectathon adventure!
game.title: Staccoons

details.title: Staccoons
details.description:
Staccoons are simple creatures. They scurry around and rummage through trash just like regular old raccoons, but they also love to stack! They have adapted the unique ability to stack to extreme heights, which allows them to scale tall buildings and leap off each other to travel great distances.

You are Filo, a city-dwelling Staccoon with lofty dreams of reaching paradise: Staccoon Island, an exclusive wildlife preserve for Staccoons to stack to their hearts' content. But be warned! The way is treacherous, and the stakes are sky high. 
Fix Performance Issues On Chrome!
Settings -> System -> Use graphics acceleration when available -> Relaunch Chrome (This should help with other games too!)If that doesn't work,  switch to Edge or Firefox
WASD to move
Mouse to control camera

Space to jump

R to reset to last trash can

game.short_text: Hop over windows and resize
game.title: [window]s[hopper]

details.title: [window]s[hopper]
details.description:
Hop through interdimensional windows  to shop for unique items  for a galactic raffle party. Use the SCALER device that was built to scale the space and time  inside dimensions.

Controls:
Arrow Keys or W, A, S, D = Move shopper
Mouse = Resize Windows
I, J, K, L = Resize active window

Credits:
- https://github.com/geegaz/Multiple-Windows-tutorial
